factions.name: Pirates
mechanics: Making Small Minions Walk The Plank

cards.name: Pirate King
cards.text: Power 5 - Special: Before a base scores, you may move this minion there.

cards.name: Buccaneer
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: once per turn, if this minion would be destroyed, you may move it to another base instead.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (Special to Ongoing; may move instead of mandatory)

cards.name: Cut Lass
cards.text: Power 3 - You may destroy a minion here of power 2 or less.

cards.name: First Mate
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After this base is scored, you may move this minion to another base instead of the discard pile.
clarifications: This ability triggers each time the base First Mate is on scores; this can happen more than once per turn. The First Mate cannot move to the base that replaces the scored base.

cards.name: Broadside
cards.text: Destroy all of one player's minions of power 2 or less on a base where you have a minion.

cards.name: Cannon
cards.text: Destroy up to two minions of power 2 or less.

cards.name: Dinghy
cards.text: Move up to two of your minions to other bases.
clarifications: You can move the minions to different bases.

cards.name: Full Sail
cards.text: Move any number of your minions to other bases. Special: Before a base scores, you may play this card.
clarifications: You can move the minions to different bases.

cards.name: Powderkeg
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions and all minions with equal or less power on the same base.
clarifications: If you choose a minion that can't be destroyed, the other minions are still destroyed (unless also immune).

cards.name: Sea Dogs
cards.text: Name a faction. Move all other players’ minions of that faction from one base to another.

cards.name: Shanghai
cards.text: Move another player’s minion to another base.

cards.name: Swashbuckling
cards.text: Each of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: Its effects only apply to minions currently in play, not to minions played later in the turn.

cards.name: The Kraken
cards.text: Special: After a base scores where you had a minion while this card is not in play, you may say “Release the Kraken!” to play this titan on the base that replaces it. Talent: Move this titan to another base. Other players’ minions there get -1 power until the start of your next turn. Special: After this base scores, move one of your minions from here to another base.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (until start of your next turn instead of end of turn)
clarifications: Yes, you must say "Release the Kraken!" - if you do not, you must instead communicate the concept of Releasing the Kraken with another method (e.g. writing the phrase). The Kraken won't know if it is released unless you tell it!

cards.name: Maui
cards.text: Power 5 - Play up to two bases from the top of the base deck. Talent: Move one of your minions to a base where you have no minions.
clarifications: This card can increase the number of bases in the game.

cards.name: Wayfinder
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to a base where you have no minions to place a +1 power counter on it.

cards.name: Tiki
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If this minion has an action on it, it has +2 power.

cards.name: Mo'ai
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Other players cannot move their minions to this base or move this minion to another base.

cards.name: Growth of the Tribes
cards.text: Choose a base where you have no minions. Play an extra minion there immediately or move one of your minions to there.

cards.name: Knowledge of the Tribes
cards.text: Draw a card for each base where you have a minion.

cards.name: Unity of the Tribes
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Gain +2 power there for each base where you have at least one minion until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Ocean Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions at a base with no other player’s minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base to place a +1 power counter on it.

cards.name: Shark Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Place a +1 power counter on it. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.name: Sun Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. Special: After a base scores you may play this card on one of your minions there with no actions on it to move it to another base instead of the discard pile.

cards.name: Tattoo Artist
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that can be played on a minion and place it into your hand or play it as an extra action.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.

cards.name: Volcanic Uprising
cards.text: Play the top card of the base deck and you may move one of your minions to it, OR destroy a base with no player’s minions on it and replace it with two bases.
clarifications: This card can increase the number of bases in the game.

factions.name: Princesses
mechanics: Eliza - generally a lack of extra card plays; there is only one: Some Day My Prince Will Come
Griselda - bonus power: Heirloom, Fairy Godmother
Marie DeGraw - draw cards: Direct to DVD Sequel, Fairy Godmother, Skillet
Sleeping Beauty - shuffle select cards into the deck: Direct to DVD Sequel, Woodland Helpers
Snow White - move minions: True Love's Kiss, Tale as Old as Time, Some Day My Prince Will Come

cards.name: Apricot
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Destroy another player’s minion of power 2 or less here.

cards.name: Eliza
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Other players cannot play more than one extra card per turn.
clarifications: Any minions or actions played out of turn, or outside the Play Cards phase of your turn, count as extra cards.

cards.name: Griselda
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Draw an Heirloom from your discard OR play an Heirloom as an extra action.

cards.name: Marie DeGraw
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a minion, draw it. Otherwise, place it on the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Sleeping Beauty
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: If this minion would go to the discard pile, shuffle it into your deck instead.

cards.name: Snow White
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Move a minion from another base to here.

cards.name: Direct to DVD Sequel
cards.text: Shuffle a minion from your discard pile into your deck and draw a card.

cards.name: Fairy Godmother
cards.text: Draw two cards, OR one minion gets +3 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Happily Ever After
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you are the winner here when this base scores, gain 1 VP.

cards.name: Heirloom
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This card gives this minion +1 power for each Heirloom on it. This card cannot be destroyed.
clarifications: One of these on a minion gives it +1 power. Two of them on a minion give it +2 each, for +4 power total. All three on the same minion give it +3 each, for +9 power total.

cards.name: Skillet
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 2 or less and draw a card.

cards.name: Some Day My Prince Will Come
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, move a minion from there to another base.

cards.name: Tale as Old as Time
cards.text: Choose a base. Move all of your minions to it.

cards.name: True Love's Kiss
cards.text: Move a minion to another base.

cards.name: Woodland Helpers
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a standard action, you may place it on the bottom of your deck instead of in your discard pile.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer applies to non-standard actions)

cards.name: Nukebot
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After this minion is destroyed, destroy each other player’s minions on this base.

cards.name: Warbot
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed.

cards.name: Hoverbot
cards.text: Power 3 - Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is a minion, you may play it as an extra minion. Otherwise, return it to the top of your deck.
clarifications: You must play or return the minion immediately.

cards.name: Zapbot
cards.text: Power 2 - You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less.

cards.name: Microbot Alpha
cards.text: Power 1 - Ongoing: Gains +1 power for each of your other Microbots. All of your minions are considered Microbots.
clarifications: All of your non-Microbot minions are also considered Microbots, while still being considered their original selves. This only applies to minions in play, not those in the hand or discard pile. But since this ability is ongoing, the amount of power gain changes as other Microbots come and go.

cards.name: Microbot Archive
cards.text: Power 1 - After one of your Microbots (including this one) is destroyed, draw a card.

cards.name: Microbot Fixer
cards.text: Power 1 - If this is the first minion you played this turn, you may play an extra minion. Ongoing: Each of your Microbots gains +1 power.
clarifications: If both Fixers are in play, each Microbot had +2 power, including both Fixers.

cards.name: Microbot Guard
cards.text: Power 1 - Destroy a minion on this base with power less than the number of minions you have here.

cards.name: Microbot Reclaimer
cards.text: Power 1 - If this is the first minion you played this turn, you may play an extra minion. Shuffle any number of Microbots from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: Tech Center
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw one card for each of your minions there.

cards.name: The Monarch
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a Groupie, reveal it and place it into your hand. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.

cards.name: Classic Rocker
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: If this base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, draw a card. Use only one Classic Rocker ability per turn.

cards.name: Rick Roll
cards.text: Power 3 - Move up to three of your minions from bases with lower breakpoints to here.

cards.name: Groupie
cards.text: Power 2 - Play another Groupie here as an extra minion.

cards.name: Guest Star
cards.text: Search your deck and/or discard pile for a Groupie and reveal it. Place it in your hand or play it as an extra minion. Shuffle your deck if you searched it.

cards.name: Hot Venue
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here have +1 power. If this base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, draw a card at the end of any turn that you play a minion here.

cards.name: Power Ballad
cards.text: Choose a base. Your minions there gain +1 power until the end of the turn. Special: If the base has a breakpoint of 21 or higher, you may play this card before the base scores.

cards.name: Reunion Tour
cards.text: Shuffle any number of your minions from your discard pile into your deck.

cards.name: Rock of Luuv
cards.text: Search your deck for up to three minions with power 2 or less and the same name. Reveal them, place them into your hand and shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Total Sellout
cards.text: Special: Play after a base scores where you have a minion. Draw two cards. Draw another card if the breakpoint was 21 or higher.

cards.name: Tour Bus
cards.text: Choose a base. Move up to three of your minions from bases with lower breakpoint to there.

cards.name: Turn Up to 11
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If this base’s starting breakpoint is less than 21, it is increased to 21.
clarifications: Monsters etc. still affect the breakpoint after the change to the starting breakpoint. If there is a conflict between multiple abilities that set the starting breakpoint (e.g. Overgrowth, Marking Territory, Turn Up To 11), the current player chooses which one prevails. Monsters, and abilities that adjust the breakpoint (e.g. Rampage, Wyvern, Favor of Zeus), adjust it from that new starting value.

cards.name: Gal-Woman
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Play an extra play-on-minion action from any player’s discard pile. At the end of the turn, or when it leaves play, place it on the bottom of its owner’s deck.

cards.name: Guy-Man
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Copy the talent of another one of your minions.

cards.name: Andko
cards.text: Power 3 - Effect

cards.name: Man-With-Arms
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: If this minion has an action on it, it gains +2 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: Once per turn, when this minion would use a talent given by an action, it may instead use another of its talents an extra time.

cards.name: Frogga
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a play-on-minion action off the top of your deck. Ongoing: When this minion leaves play, you may shuffle an action on it into your deck.

cards.name: Young Noble
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: If a Sword card is on this minion, swap this minion for a minion of power 5 or more from your hand, deck, or discard pile.

cards.name: Armor of Battle
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Increase the breakpoint of this base by 2 for each of your minions here with an action on it until the start of your next turn.”

cards.name: Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons!
cards.text: Transfer any number of actions on your minions to your other minions. Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions you transferred an action to.

cards.name: Fearless Friend
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Move this minion.”

cards.name: Magic Weapon
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion gains +1 power until the start of your next turn for each player with a minion here OR if there is only one action on this minion, draw a card.”

cards.name: MYAAAH!
cards.text: Return a play-on-minion action from one of your minions or from your discard pile to its owner’s hand. Play it as an extra action.

cards.name: Mystic Transference
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of each other player’s turn, choose one of your actions in play that gives a talent. This minion may copy that talent immediately. Talent: Transfer one of your actions between this minion and another of your minions.

cards.name: Now You Know: Toxic Waste
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. Special: You may play this before a base scores to transfer an action from one of your minions to another instead; then you may use a talent on the minion the action was transferred to.

cards.name: Powerful Sword
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability “Talent: This minion is not affected by other players’ cards until the start of your next turn.” Talent: Transfer another action from this minion to another of your minions.

cards.name: Sword That's Powerful
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this minion.” If this minion’s printed power is 5 or more, it has +2 power.

cards.name: Baba Yaga
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Place another minion here on the bottom of its owner’s deck to have them play a minion off the top of their deck here as an extra minion, then shuffle their deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.

cards.name: Finist the Falcon
cards.text: Power 4 - Special: Before a base scores, you may move this minion to there, or return this minion from there to your hand and play it on another base as an extra minion.
clarifications: If a card is played again, its ability can be used again unless it says otherwise.

cards.name: The Birch Woman
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, you may search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for The Birch, and add it to your hand or play it as an extra minion.
clarifications: Going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.

cards.name: The Gray Wolf
cards.text: Power 3 - Talent: Place this minion on top of its owner’s deck to play an extra minion here and place a +1 power counter on it.

cards.name: Foolish Magician
cards.text: Power 3 - Draw three cards, then place three cards from your hand on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order

cards.name: The Birch
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, you may destroy this minion to search your hand, deck, and/or discard pile for The Birch Woman, and add it to your hand or play it here as an extra minion.
clarifications: Destroying this minion because of any other ability does not trigger this ability.
Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.

cards.name: Tsar Eagle
cards.text: Power 2 - Draw a card OR place a minion from another player’s discard pile on top of their deck.

cards.name: Toad
cards.text: Power 0 - You may give control of this minion to another player to shuffle another one of their minions here into its owner’s deck.

cards.name: Bewitched
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. When this minion leaves play, transfer this action to another minion.

cards.name: Fetch I Know Not What
cards.text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal two actions. You may place any number of those actions into your hand. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

cards.name: Go I Know Not Whither
cards.text: Choose a base. Shuffle a random minion there controlled by each other player into its owner’s deck.

cards.name: Go See My Sister
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move one of your minions to here, you may draw a card.

cards.name: Mass Transformation
cards.text: Each player places their hand on the bottom of their deck and draws an equal number of cards.

cards.name: The Frog Princess
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Talent: Place this minion on the bottom of its owner’s deck to play a minion off the top of your deck here as an extra minion and transfer this action to it, then shuffle your deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.
If you use the ability of Baba Yaga or Transformation on the minion this card is on, this card is discarded without triggering.

cards.name: The Water of Life
cards.text: Place a minion from your discard pile on top of your deck. You may play an extra action.

cards.name: Transformation
cards.text: Place a minion on the bottom of its owner’s deck to have them play a minion off the top of their deck there as an extra minion, then shuffle their deck.
clarifications: Cards that specify how to choose the extra card require you to play it immediately.

cards.name: Nick Fury
cards.text: power 5 - You may play an extra character here.

cards.name: Maria Hill
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: After you play another character here, this character gains +1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Agent Coulson
cards.text: power 3 - You may play a character of power 2 or less here as an extra character.

cards.name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: If another of your characters is here, this character has +1 power.

cards.name: Entry Point
cards.text: Play an extra character.

cards.name: Mission Debriefing
cards.text: Choose a base. Draw a card for each of your characters there.

cards.name: Proving Ground
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Play a character of power 3 or less here as an extra character.

cards.name: Reassignment
cards.text: Choose a base. Move up to two of your characters from other bases to there.

cards.name: Rescue Mission
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, shuffle all of your characters there into their owners’ decks and draw a card.

cards.name: Superior Firepower
cards.text: Destroy a base modifier or a character of power 3 or less.

cards.name: Troop Drop
cards.text: Play a character of power 3 or less as an extra character.

cards.name: Work Together
cards.text: Each of your characters currently in play gains +1 power until the end of the turn.

factions.name: Samurai
mechanics: Gaining Benefits From Going To Discard From Play

cards.name: Shogun
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another of your minions goes to the discard pile from play, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Bushi
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play while it has 5 or more power, gain 1 VP.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Ronin
cards.text: Power 3 - If this is your only minion on this base, you may place two +1 power counters on it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (two counters instead of one, and now optional(

cards.name: Samurai-Chan
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Code of Bushido
cards.text: Place three total +1 power counters on your minions.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (your choice of how to distribute counters, rather than needing to be on three separate minions)

cards.name: Final Haiku
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, your minions each gain +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Heart of the Battle
cards.text: Special: Play before a base scores. One of your minions there duels another player’s minion there. Destroy the losing minion.

cards.name: Honor the Ancestors
cards.text: Place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. For each other player in the game, you may shuffle a minion from your discard pile back into your deck.
clarifications: In a 2-player game you shuffle one minion into your deck, in a 3-player game two, and in a 4-player game three minions.

cards.name: Honor the Fallen
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After one of your minions here goes to the discard pile, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Honorable Combat
cards.text: Choose a base where another player has more power than you. One of your minions there duels one of that player’s minions there. The controller of the winning minion gains 1 VP.

cards.name: Way of the Warrior
cards.text: Until the end of the turn, one of your minions gains +3 power, and if it goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: A minion going to the discard pile from play includes both being discarded after scoring, and being destroyed.

cards.name: Yokai Attack!
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions to play an extra minion and an extra action.

cards.name: Doppelgänger
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, search your deck for a minion and play it as an extra minion.
clarifications: Since minions on a scored base are discarded before the base is replaced, this card’s replacement cannot be played onto the new base. If Transmogrify destroys Doppelgänger, both abilities trigger. If conditions prohibit playing the chosen minion, discard it instead.

cards.name: G.E.L.F.
cards.text: Power 0 - Talent: Search your deck for a non-G.E.L.F. minion of power 4 or less. Shuffle this minion into your deck and play that minion here as an extra minion.

cards.name: Mimic
cards.text: Power 0 - Ongoing: This minion’s power is equal to the highest power printed on a minion card in play.
clarifications: Mimic’s starting power equals the highest printed power in play, but it can then be modified by abilities or +1 power counters. If the highest printed power in play changes, so does the starting power of Mimic. While in your hand or deck Mimic’s power is 0; it can be played by G.E.L.F., “...Really?” and Transmogrify.

cards.name: Copycat
cards.text: Power 2 - Choose another player’s minion in play. This card has the same ability as that minion until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This can copy any type of ability (on-play, Ongoing, Special, Talent), though not every ability will trigger before the end of the turn. Being immune to effects (e.g., Elder Thing) does not prevent copying. The copied ability expires if the Copycat leaves play before the end of the turn. Copying a minion’s ability does not copy its name (e.g., copying War Raptor lets it increase power for other War Raptors but not for itself). Ignore prerequisites for playing (e.g., Shoggoth) since the Copycat is already in play. If the copied ability imposes conditions that last beyond the end of the turn (e.g., Mind Lady, Bruiser), then treat the effect the same way that you would if the original card were to leave play before its effects ended.

cards.name: "...Really?"
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Play an extra minion from your discard pile with the same or lower power.
clarifications: You can destroy a minion and immediately play it from the discard pile.

cards.name: Bacta the Future
cards.text: Destroy a minion. That minion’s owner may immediately play an extra minion.
clarifications: If the minion you choose to destroy is protected, you still resolve the rest of the ability.

cards.name: Cellular Bonding
cards.text: Play on a minion. Choose an action on a minion. Ongoing: This card has the abilities of the chosen action.
clarifications: The copied ability continues as long as Cellular Bonding is in play, even if the action being copied leaves play. If you play Cellular Bonding while there is no play-on-minion action in play, discard it with no effect. You may play this card on another player’s minion and copy an ability that says “Play on your minion” or “Play on one of your minions”; ignore that part unless it is a prerequisite (e.g., Change Into a Gun), in which case the prerequisite is not met.

cards.name: Genetic Shift
cards.text: Each of your minions gets +1 power until the end of the turn OR one of your minions gets +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The first part of this ability only affects minions currently in play.

cards.name: Mitosis
cards.text: Choose your minion in play. Play a copy of that card from your hand as an extra minion.

cards.name: Shell Game
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion cannot be destroyed.

cards.name: Splice as Nice
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power.

cards.name: Transmogrify
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions. Search your deck for a minion with the same or lower power and play it as an extra minion. Shuffle your deck.
clarifications: If the minion you choose to destroy is protected, you still resolve the rest of the ability.

cards.name: Megalodon
cards.text: Power 5 - You may destroy a minion of power 4 or less here. Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion here of power 3 or less.

cards.name: Great White
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base and destroy a minion there of power 2 or less.

cards.name: Hammerhead
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After a minion here is destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: If several minions at its base are destroyed at once, it gets a power counter for each one.

cards.name: Mako
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: After you destroy a minion on any base, you may play this minion there as an extra minion.
clarifications: If you draw Mako because of Torn Apart, you may also play it immediately.

cards.name: Air Jaws
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base, then destroy a minion there of power 3 or less.

cards.name: Blood in the Water
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is destroyed here, you may play a minion here of power 3 or less as an extra minion.

cards.name: Chum
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: After a minion is destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: The minion destroyed can be at any base.

cards.name: Dangerous Waters
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Choose a minion here. It gets -2 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Feeding Frenzy
cards.text: Choose a base. Destroy any number of minions there of power 2 or less.

cards.name: Freakin' Laser Beam
cards.text: Choose one of your minions. Destroy a minion with equal or lower power at your minion’s base.

cards.name: Torn Apart
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 3 or less and draw a card.

cards.name: Week of Sharks
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, draw an extra card at the end of your turn. Only use one Week of Sharks ability each turn.

cards.name: Helicoprion
cards.text: Special: While this titan is not in play, at the start of your turn or after any minion is destroyed, place a counter on this titan. Then if there are four or more counters on it, you may remove the counters and play it. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you destroy any player's minion, you may either move this titan to the minion's base and add its power to your total there until the end of the turn, or place a +1 power counter on this titan. Talent: Shuffle a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile into your deck, OR search your deck and/or discard pile for a Mako and place it into your hand.

cards.name: Little Bo Peep
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Other players can not move minions to or from here. Talent: Move one of your minions to here.

cards.name: Ram
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base, then you may return a minion of power 2 or less at that base to its owner’s hand.

cards.name: Black Sheep
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After another minion is played here, move this minion to another base.
clarifications: Black Sheep’s ability has it moved by its controller, so Little Bo Peep does not block the ability unless they have different controllers. It is also not blocked by cards like Incorporeal

cards.name: Flock
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, move this minion to there as well.
clarifications: This cannot follow minions that move after a base scores.

cards.name: Counting Sheep
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, your minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (once per turn added) - errata'd in the Bigger Geekier Box
clarifications: The other player’s minion does not have to be at Counting Sheep’s base to trigger it. This card does not affect minions played after this card.

cards.name: Ewe Shall Pass
cards.text: Move one of your minions to another base. Draw a card. You may play an extra action.

cards.name: Hello, Dolly!
cards.text: Special: Play after another player plays an action. Copy the ability of that action.
clarifications: This acts as if the ability of the action being copied were printed on it. If it copies an action that is played on a minion or a base, it is also played on a minion or base, and not necessarily the same one. Hello, Dolly! can copy actions that have conditions for being played (e.g. Make Contact, Cosplay) without having to fulfill those conditions; it has its own conditions for being played, so the other card’s conditions are moot.

cards.name: In Sheep's Clothing
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, you may move this minion to there as well and destroy this action.

cards.name: On the Lamb
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion, and another player. Move that minion and all of that player’s minions there to a single other base.
clarifications: You may choose a player with no minions there and move “all” those minions, even if someone else does have minions there. All the minions go to the same base.

cards.name: Shearing
cards.text: Play on a minion. Draw a card. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. At the start of your turn, return this action to your hand.
clarifications: If Shearing leaves play before the start of your next turn, you do not return it to your hand.

cards.name: To Follow, or Not?
cards.text: Choose another player. Choose a random action in their discard pile. Play it as an extra action or return it. Draw a card.
clarifications: If you play another player’s card, you control it and its ability is carried out from your point of view; when it leaves play it goes back to the owner’s hand, deck, or discard pile.

cards.name: Wood for Sheep
cards.text: Choose another player. Reveal a random card from their hand. You may place a card from your hand into their hand to play the revealed card. Otherwise return it and play an extra action.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (gain an extra action if you do not play the card)
clarifications: If you play another player’s card, you control it and its ability is carried out from your point of view; when it leaves play it goes back to the owner’s hand, deck, or discard pile.

cards.name: Doctor Octopus
cards.text: power 4 - Ongoing: At the start of your turn, you may reduce this base’s breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Mysterio
cards.text: power 4 - Talent: Play a base modifier here as an extra action OR draw a card.

cards.name: Green Goblin
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Reduce this base’s breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Vulture
cards.text: power 3 - You may place a base modifier from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Electro
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is reduced by 2.

cards.name: Sandman
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This character has +2 power if the breakpoint here is 19 or less.

cards.name: Ambush
cards.text: Reduce a base’s breakpoint by 4 until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Cover the Exits
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Your characters here have +1 power. After this base scores, if its breakpoint was 19 or less, shuffle up to two of your characters here into their owners’ deck.

cards.name: Incite Panic
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: Other players’ characters here have -1 power. If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, other players cannot use Special abilities while this base is scoring.

cards.name: Move the Goods
cards.text: Move a base modifier from one base to another. Special: You may play this after a base scores.

cards.name: My Master Plan
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, draw a card.

cards.name: Pressure from All Sides
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Reduce this base’s breakpoint by 1 for each character on it until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Reroute the Power
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If the breakpoint here is 19 or less, give one of your characters here +3 power until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Witness Our Superiority
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: This base’s abilities are cancelled.

cards.name: Lord of Bones
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another minion is uncovered, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Talent: Bury a card from your hand here or uncover one of your buried cards here.

cards.name: Gravetender
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after one of your other cards is buried or uncovered, draw a card

cards.name: Revenant
cards.text: Power 3 - Special: On your turn, you may bury this card from your discard pile. Use only one Revenant ability per turn.

cards.name: Returned One
cards.text: Power 2 - You may bury this minion here. Special: After this card is uncovered, you may uncover another one of your buried cards here.

cards.name: Burst Forth
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, uncover one of your buried cards there.

cards.name: Dig 'em Up
cards.text: Choose a base. Uncover up to three of your buried cards there.

cards.name: Grave Goods
cards.text: Bury a card from your hand, and you may discard a card to bury another one; OR uncover one of your buried cards, and if it is a minion, place two +1 power counters on it.

cards.name: Gravestones
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is uncovered here, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Special: After this base scores, bury this card on another base.

cards.name: Graveyard
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Uncover one of your buried cards here. If it is a minion, you may place a +1 power counter on it.

cards.name: Hearse Fleet
cards.text: Move any number of your buried cards from one base to another. Special: You may play this card before a base scores to move up to two of your buried cards to or from that base instead.

cards.name: Place 'em Down
cards.text: Bury up to three minions from your discard pile with total power of 6 or less.

cards.name: Spooky, Scary
cards.text: Bury a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile. Draw a card.

cards.name: Jonas
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Machete from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after this minion moves, you may destroy a minion of power 3 or less there to give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Frederick
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Clawed Glove from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions here have -1 power. You may destroy a minion of power 1 or less here.

cards.name: Mickey
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Austin Kirk Mask from your deck or discard pile. Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion of printed power 3 or less here.

cards.name: Tackhead
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Puzzle Box from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Transfer one of your actions to another minion OR destroy a minion with Puzzle Box on it.

cards.name: Cederface
cards.text: Power 5 - You may draw Chainsaw from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this minion, you may destroy a minion here of power 3 or less.

cards.name: Brutal Attack
cards.text: Destroy a minion with printed power 3 or less at a base with one of your minions, then you may give a Slasher there +3 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Ch-Ch-Ch Ha-Ha-Ha
cards.text: Move one of your minions. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile OR play an extra action.

cards.name: He Was A Good Boy!
cards.text: Place a minion from the discard pile into your hand and play an extra action.

cards.name: Hide in the Laundry
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Play an extra action. Ongoing: After a Slasher is played or moved to here, you may destroy this minion unless its controller discards a card and moves this minion to a base without a Slasher.

cards.name: Improvised Weapon
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. You may play it as an extra action; destroy it at the end of the turn.

cards.name: Oh Noooooo!
cards.text: One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: After you destroy another player’s minion, you may play this card as an extra action.

cards.name: Origin Story
cards.text: Draw a minion off the top of your deck, or if you do not have a Slasher in play, draw a Slasher off the top of your deck. Play an extra action.
clarifications: You only get the first version of the effect if you have a Slasher in play - if you do not have a Slasher in play, you must draw a Slasher specifically off the top of your deck (not a minion of any faction).

cards.name: The End?
cards.text: Draw a play-on-minion action from your discard pile. You may play it as an extra action.

cards.name: Austin Kirk Mask
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, give this minion the amount of power of one of those minions until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Chainsaw
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place a +1 power counter on this minion. After a minion is destroyed, you may move this minion to or from its base.

cards.name: Clawed Glove
cards.text: Play on your minion. Talent: Give a minion here -1 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.name: Machete
cards.text: Play on your minion. Talent: Move this minion to a base with another player’s minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, your minions here each gain +1 power until the end of the turn. At the end of the turn, if this minion destroyed a minion this turn, return this card to your hand.

cards.name: Puzzle Box
cards.text: Play on your minion. Ongoing: If you do not control this minion, its abilities are cancelled. After one or more minions are destroyed, draw a card.

cards.name: King Rex
cards.text: Power 7 - (no ability)
clarifications: The ability is deliberately blank. (What, do you think King Rex isn't strong enough already?)

cards.name: Granny
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Look at the top card of your deck. Place it on the top or bottom of your deck.

cards.name: G.E.L.F.
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Search your deck for a non-G.E.L.F. minion of power 4 or less. Shuffle this minion into your deck and play that minion here as an extra minion.

cards.name: Imperial Dragon
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: After another player plays or moves a minion here, draw a card.
clarifications: This triggers when a minion moves to here, not from here. Moving this minion activates it.

cards.name: Lab Assistant
cards.text: Power 3 - Place a +1 power counter on another one of your minions.

cards.name: Puck
cards.text: Power 3 - Play an extra action OR draw a card.

cards.name: Ensign
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: When an opponent plays a card that directly affects one of your other minions here, you may have it affect this minion instead.
clarifications: It can take on ongoing or special effects, but not from cards already in play. It can take on multiple effects if it makes sense (e.g. multiple -1 power, but not multiple destroys unless it’s immune). It can have an action played on a different minion played on itself instead. It can substitute for a different minion being taken control of. It cannot take an effect already taken by a different Ensign from a third minion. It can take an effect even if it does not fit the original target’s prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”).

cards.name: Fan
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn, you may discard this card from your hand to draw a card.

cards.name: Servitor of Cthulhu
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Destroy this minion and place an action card from your discard pile on top of your deck.
clarifications: If your attempt to destroy this card fails because it is protected from destruction, you still place the action card. Destroying a Servitor on R’lyeh counts either for the Servitor’s ability (during the Play Cards phase, to place an action card) or for R’lyeh’s ability (at the start of the turn, to earn 1VP), but not both.

cards.name: Sprout
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: Destroy this card at the start of your turn. You may search your deck for a minion of power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.
cards.errata: Yes, Reversion (reverted to original version from Bigger Geekier Box errata)
clarifications: A Sprout may not destroy itself the same turn it is played.

cards.name: Begin the Summoning
cards.text: TBA

cards.name: Favor of Dionysus
cards.text: One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Play an extra action. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile.

cards.name: Friendship Power
cards.text: Move one of your minions to a base where you have a minion. You may place this action into your hand instead of the discard pile.

cards.name: Full Moon
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Each of your minions here has +1 power.

cards.name: Ghostly Arrival
cards.text: You may play an extra minion and/or an extra action.

cards.name: It's Astounding
cards.text: Play an action from your discard pile as an extra action.
clarifications: Play the extra action immediately, before discarding It’s Astounding.

cards.name: Non-Infinite Loop
cards.text: Play an extra standard action, then you may place it back into your hand instead of where it would normally go.
clarifications: The extra action must be played at once. If you choose an action whose conditions for play are not met (e.g., Cosplay, Force of Wil), it has no effect and you just return it to your hand.

cards.name: Prepare for Battle
cards.text: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Draw two of them and return the other to the top or bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Seeing Stars
cards.text: Destroy a minion of power 3 or less.

cards.name: Square Deal
cards.text: Draw cards until at least one player has fewer cards in their hand than you.

cards.name: Spider-Man
cards.text: power 5 - Ongoing: After you play a card that has a Special ability, this character gains +1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Ghost-Spider
cards.text: power 4 - Look at the top three cards of your deck, draw one, and return the rest to the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Miles Morales
cards.text: power 3 - Special: Before a base scores, if you have a character there, you may play this character there, and give it -1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Spider-Man 2099
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: This character cannot be destroyed by other players’ cards.

cards.name: ...Comes Great Responsibility
cards.text: Play an extra character. Special: You may play this before a base scores where you have a character. Play the extra character there. It gains -1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Spider-Sense
cards.text: Draw two cards. Special: You may play this after a base where you have a character scores.

cards.name: Spider-Verse Bond
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has +1 power for each of your other characters here.

cards.name: Spider Reflexes
cards.text: Look at the top three cards of your deck, draw one, and return the rest to the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. You may play an extra action.

cards.name: The View From Above
cards.text: Say either “character” or “action”. Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a card of that type, and draw it. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

cards.name: Webbed Up
cards.text: Character modifier. Ongoing: This character has -2 power and its abilities are cancelled.

cards.name: With Great Power...
cards.text: Give a character +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: You may play this before a base scores. Give a character there +2 power until the end of the turn instead of +3.

cards.name: Your Friendly Neighborhood Hero
cards.text: Special: After a base scores, place one of your characters there on top of its owner’s deck.

factions.name: Star Roamers
mechanics: Returning Your Minions To Your Hand

cards.name: Ship's Captain
cards.text: Power 5 - Search your deck for a minion, reveal it, add it to your hand and shuffle your deck. If it has power 3 or less, play it here as an extra minion.

cards.name: Medical Officer
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: When one or more of your other minions would be returned to your hand, you may draw a card instead of returning one of them.

cards.name: Science Officer
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Return one of your minions of power 4 or less to its owner’s hand. Play an extra minion with a different name.
clarifications: You can return a minion you control but don’t own, and still do the rest of the ability.

cards.name: Ship's Engineer
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: If another one of your minions would be returned to your hand, you may move it to another base instead.
clarifications: These don’t trigger if you return a minion you don’t own, since it doesn’t go to your hand.

cards.name: Ensign
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: When an opponent plays a card that directly affects one of your other minions here, you may have it affect this minion instead.
clarifications: It can take on ongoing or special effects, but not from cards already in play. It can take on multiple effects if it makes sense (e.g. multiple -1 power, but not multiple destroys unless it’s immune). It can have an action played on a different minion played on itself instead. It can substitute for a different minion being taken control of. It cannot take an effect already taken by a different Ensign from a third minion. cards.name: Hyperspeed 10
cards.text: Choose a base. Move all minions from there to a single other base.

cards.name: Mass Teleport
cards.text: Each player returns one of their minions to its owner’s hand.

cards.name: Port Me Up
cards.text: Return one of your minions to its owner’s hand. Special: You may play this after a base scores; the minion must be on the scoring base.

cards.name: Protector Fields
cards.text: Play on a base where you have a minion. Ongoing: Your minions here are not affected by other players’ cards.

cards.name: Teleport Error
cards.text: Choose a minion. Move it to another random base.

cards.name: Teleport Overflow
cards.text: Return one of your minions to its owner’s hand. Reveal any number of minions with the same name from your hand, and play them as extra minions.
clarifications: You can return a minion you control but don’t own, and still do the rest of the ability.
The minions don’t have to have the same name as the returned minion, but have the same name as each other. A single minion counts as a group with the same name.

cards.name: Weird New Worlds
cards.text: Play a new base. You may play an extra minion on it.
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (no longer a "play on base" action and the extra base is now permanent)

cards.name: Whiplash Maneuver
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If any of your minions on other bases would be returned to your hand, you may move them here instead.
clarifications: These don’t trigger if you return a minion you don’t own, since it doesn’t go to your hand.

factions.name: Steampunks
mechanics: Minions and Actions Support Each Other

cards.name: Steam Queen
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Your actions are not affected by other players’ cards.

cards.name: Mechanic
cards.text: Power4 - Choose an action in your discard pile that can be played on a base and play it as an extra action.

cards.name: Steam Man
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Has +1 power if this base has one of your actions played on it.
clarifications: This triggers if you have more than one action on its base.

cards.name: Captain Ahab
cards.text: Power 2 - Talent: Move this minion to a base that has one of your actions played on it.

cards.name: Aggromotive
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, you have +5 power here.
clarifications: The +5 power is not added to any minion, but just adds to your total there, during every player’s turn.

cards.name: Change of Venue
cards.text: Place one of your actions that is on a base or minion into your hand. Play it again as an extra action.

cards.name: Difference Engine
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If you have a minion here, draw an extra card at the end of your turn.

cards.name: Escape Hatch
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: When your minions here are destroyed, return them to your hand instead.
clarifications: Minions placed into your hand do not count as being destroyed (c.f. Field of Honor).

cards.name: Ornate Dome
cards.text: Play on a base. Destroy all other players’ actions on this base. Ongoing: Other players cannot play actions on this base.
clarifications: This does not affect actions on minions, nor prevent such actions from being played. This does not block actions that target a base but are not played on it (e.g., Rampage, Disenchant).

cards.name: Rotary Slug Thrower
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here each have +2 power.

cards.name: Scrap Diving
cards.text: Place an action from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Zeppelin
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Move one of your minions from another base to here, or from here to another base.

cards.name: Yokozuna
cards.text: Power 6 - Ongoing: Your minions cannot be moved by other players’ cards. Talent: Draw a card, OR move another player’s minion from here to another base.

cards.name: Top Tier
cards.text: Power 4 - Ongoing: After you discard one or more cards from your hand, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: If an ability has you discard several cards (e.g.Bulking Stew), you only place one +1 power counter.

cards.name: Third Tier
cards.text: Power 3 - You may move another player’s minion with power 3 or less from here to another base to draw a card.

cards.name: Rookie Sumo
cards.text: Power 2 - You may discard a card to place two +1 power counters on one of your minions.

cards.name: Body Slam
cards.text: Choose another player and a base where you have a minion. Move all of their minions there to another base.

cards.name: Bulking Stew
cards.text: Discard any number of cards. For each card discarded, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.

cards.name: Chikara-Mizu
cards.text: Give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn, or discard a card to give it +4 power instead.

cards.name: Fighting Spirit Prize
cards.text: Draw two cards and place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
clarifications: You place either two +1 power counters on a single minion, or one power counter each on two minions.

cards.name: Grasp the Belt
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Move a minion from there to another base.
clarifications: You may choose to move a minion you control, even if it’s your only minion on the base.

cards.name: Head Butt
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion. Destroy another player’s action that has been played there or on a minion there.

cards.name: Performance Prize
cards.text: Draw three cards.

cards.name: Technique Prize
cards.text: Place three +1 power counters on one of your minions.

factions.name: Super Heroes
mechanics: Powering Up Into Power 5 Alter Egos
Minions With Very Low Power Or Very High Power

cards.name: Awesome Guy
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other players' cards.

cards.name: Captain Amazing
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Give each of your minions here +1 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this talent is used.

cards.name: Mind Lady
cards.text: Power 5 - Talent: Choose another player’s minion. That minion’s abilities are cancelled until the start of your next turn.
clarifications: The cancelation lasts even if Mind Lady is no longer in play.

cards.name: The Burst
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After a minion is played on a base, you may move this minion to there.

cards.name: Mild Mannered Citizen

cards.name: Expanded Power
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +1 power and can’t be destroyed by other players.

cards.name: Golden Age
cards.text: Place up to three minions from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Justice Friends
cards.text: Each of your minions of power 5 or more gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: This does not affect minions played after this card.

cards.name: My Only Weakness!
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion’s abilities are cancelled.

cards.name: Not Really Dead
cards.text: Place up to two minions of power 2 or less from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Radioactive Exposure
cards.text: Destroy one of your minions to search your deck for a minion with more power, play it there as an extra minion, and shuffle your deck.

cards.name: Secret Base
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here of power 3 or less cannot be destroyed by other players.

cards.name: Sidekick
cards.text: Choose a base where you have a minion of power 5 or more. Play a minion there of power 2 or less as an extra minion.

cards.name: The Everything Glove
cards.text: Special: After one of your minions is destroyed, you may play this titan at its base. Ongoing: Your minions of power 3 or less here are not affected by other players' abilities. Talent: Play an extra minion here of power 2 or less OR draw a card

cards.name: Secret Agent
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After another player plays an action, they must discard a card. Clarifications: *If the other player’s action destroys Secret Agent, they still have to discard a card.
clarifications: If the other player’s action destroys Secret Agent, they still have to discard a card.

cards.name: Informant
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top three cards of any deck. If you looked at your own deck, place them on the top and/or bottom in any order. Otherwise, return them in the same order. Clarifications: If you look at a different deck than your own, the cards must be returned in the same order.
clarifications: If you look at a different deck than your own, the cards must be returned in the same order.

cards.name: Discards are Forever
cards.text: Each other player discards a minion off the top of their deck. You may place a minion with power less than or equal to one of the minions discarded from your discard pile on top of your deck. Clarifications:

cards.name: For My Eyes Only
cards.text: Look at the top five cards of your deck. Place them on the top and/or bottom of your deck in any order. Clarifications: None

cards.name: From Q With Love
cards.text: Draw two cards. You may discard a card to play an extra minion or action. Clarifications: The discarded card may be one of the cards you drew with this card's ability.
clarifications: The discarded card may be one of the cards you drew with this card's ability.

cards.name: Live and Let Chum
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy a minion of power 4 or less there. Clarifications: None

cards.name: Mindraker
cards.text: Look at each other player's hand and any number of buried or stored cards. Draw a card and play an extra action. Clarifications: If you look at multiple buried or stored cards which are attached to the same card, their controller can afterwards rearrange those cards to obfuscate exactly which is which.
clarifications: If you look at multiple buried or stored cards which are attached to the same card, their controller can afterwards rearrange those cards to obfuscate exactly which is which.

cards.name: Permit to Kill
cards.text: Reveal the top two cards of each other player's deck and have them discard any minions revealed. Return the rest in any order. Choose one of those players. For each minion they discarded, place two +1 power counters among your minions. Clarifications:

cards.name: The Base is Not Enough
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, take control of a minion of power 3 or less there until the end of the turn. Clarifications: None

cards.name: The Spy Who Ditched Me
cards.text: Each other player must discard a minion or reveal their hand to show they have none. If at least one other player did not discard a minion with 3 or more power, place a +1 power counter on each of your minions. Clarifications: None

cards.name: Moon Zero Three
cards.text: Special: Instead of your regular action play, you may play this titan to look at the hand of a player with a minion at its base. Talent: Look at the top card of any deck. Place it on the top or bottom of that deck. Ongoing: After another player discards one or more cards from their hand or deck, you may place a +1 power counter on this titan. Clarifications: *If you cannot successfully play Moon Zero Three (because you have another titan in play), you cannot look at a player's hand. If Moon Zero Three is immediately clashed out of play by another player's titan, you do get to look at a player's hand, because the clash is an "after" reaction to both titans being on the same base.

cards.name: Sir Squeezes
cards.text: Power 5 - Play up to three minions of power 3 or less, whose total power is 5 or less, as extra minions here.

cards.name: Fun Bear
cards.text: Power 2 - Ongoing: After another player plays or moves a minion to here, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.name: Lovey Bear
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: This minion’s starting power is increased to the highest starting power of an opponent’s minion here.

cards.name: Snuggly Bear
cards.text: Power 1 - Special: After you play your first minion in a turn, you may immediately play this minion there as an extra minion.

cards.name: Bear Picnic
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: If other players can play minions they own of printed power 2 or less here, they cannot play minions on other bases.

cards.name: Care Package
cards.text: Draw a card and play an extra minion.

cards.name: Cuddle
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion’s abilities are cancelled.

cards.name: Group Hug
cards.text: Give one of your minions +1 power for each other minion at the same base until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Love Overload
cards.text: Special: Before a base scores, destroy the minion there with the most power. If tied, destroy all tied minions.

cards.name: Square Deal
cards.text: Draw cards until at least one player has fewer cards in their hand than you.

cards.name: Tea Party
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: If there are two or more minions here and at least one is yours, draw a card.

cards.name: Too Cute
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be destroyed by other player’s cards.

factions.name: Teens

cards.name: Brain

cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Rebel here, move up to two of your minions to other bases. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Rebel
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Jock here, you may play an extra non-Rebel minion of power 3 here. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may move one of your minions to another base.

cards.name: Jock
cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Prep here, place two +1 power counters on this minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.text: Power 3 - If there is a Brain here, you may search your deck for a minion of power 3 and draw it. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Abe Frohman

cards.name: Babysitter
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be affected by other players’ abilities.

cards.name: Booty Trap
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move a minion with printed power 3 to this base, draw a card.

cards.name: Brunch Bunch
cards.text: Choose a base. For each name on a minion of yours there with printed power 3, you may choose a different effect: Move one of your minions to there. Draw a card. cards.text: Search your deck for a minion of power 3 and play it as an extra minion.

cards.name: Principal's Office
cards.text: Return one of your minions to your hand. You may play a minion of printed power 3 as an extra minion.

cards.name: Strange Science

If another player's minion moves to or from this base as part of its resolution (Example: Twister), it is not destroyed. If another player plays an eligible minion for destruction but it removes Leprechaun from the base during its resolution (Example: Dusty Henry), it is not destroyed.

factions.name: Vikings

cards.name: Valkyrie
cards.text: Power 5 - Place a minion from another player’s discard pile into your hand.
clarifications: Cards in your hand that you do not own are still treated like your cards: you can play them normally, and you control them until they go out of play, at which point they go back to their owners. Cards you don’t own that are merely revealed in your hand or deck stay there, but if they are seen to go elsewhere they then go back to their owners, unless explicitly allowed by cards like Shield Maiden etc.

cards.name: Diva
cards.text: Power 3 - Ongoing: Once each turn, when a standard action directly affects one or more of your other minions here, you may choose this minion to be affected the same way.
clarifications: Diva cannot copy effects of actions played on minions or bases, nor of actions previously played. It cannot copy an effect already copied from a third minion by another Diva etc. It can copy once per action causing the effect, not once per minion being affected. “The same way” means e.g. moving it to the same base, or giving control of it to the same player. It can copy an effect even if it does not fit the original prerequisites (e.g. “power 3 or higher”). You must choose whether to copy an effect when the action is played, not when the effect happens. If an effect has multiple parts, choose only one part to copy. The copied effect is considered to come from the original standard action causing the effect, not from the Diva etc. allowing additional affected targets.

cards.text: Choose a minion. Until the end of the turn, it gains +2 power, and if it would go to the discard pile it is returned to its owner’s hand instead.

cards.name: Fighting Spirit Prize
cards.text: Draw two cards and place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
clarifications: You place either two +1 power counters on a single minion, or one power counter each on two minions.

cards.name: High-Speed Chase
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. That minion gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
clarifications: The power boost is unchanged even if High-Speed Chase is destroyed.

cards.name: It's Blitzin' Time!
cards.text: One of your minions gains +4 power until the end of the turn
cards.errata: Yes, Functional (part of Mega Troopers rework)

cards.name: Kaiju Conflict
cards.text: Play two extra actions

cards.name: Mouse, Bird and Sausage
cards.text: Choose up to two minions of the same faction at a base to gain +2 power each until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Shark Tattoo
cards.text: Play on one of your minions. Place a +1 power counter on it. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.name: Smart Set-Up
cards.text: Play on another player’s minion. Ongoing: After the first time each turn a minion is played here, draw a card.

factions.name: Wraithrustlers
mechanics: Wraith On-Base Actions That Give Benefits For Being Destroyed

cards.name: Funkman
cards.text: Power 5 - Ongoing: After you destroy an action, give each of your minions on its base +1 power until the end of the turn OR draw a card. Special: Before a base scores, you may transfer an action on it to another base.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.

cards.name: Ellen
cards.text: Power 4 - Talent: Destroy one of your actions on this base to reduce this base’s breakpoint by 3 until the end of the turn. Ongoing: After a Wraith is destroyed here, you may play an extra action.
clarifications: Abilities that have an effect “until Y” only affect cards currently in play, but their effect lasts until Y even if the card that caused it leaves play or moves away, or even if any precondition stops being true.
For cards with a trigger for their effect – e.g. “After X happens” – the effect is done each time X happens, even if multiple Xs happen at the same time.
A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.

cards.name: Roy
cards.text: Power 3 - You may transfer one of your actions from another base to here. Ongoing: If a Wraith has been destroyed here this turn, this minion has +2 power.
clarifications: A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.

cards.name: Watson
cards.text: Power 2 - You may destroy one of your actions on this base OR reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Wraith, draw it, and shuffle the rest into your deck.
clarifications: A Wraith is an action with the label “Wraith” on it – Slimy, Librarian Haunt, Demon Dogs, and Ancient Sumerian God.

cards.name: Ancient Sumerian God
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Talent: Store an action from your discard pile that can be played on a base under this card. Ongoing: This base's breakpoint is increased by 3. When this card leaves play, for each base you may play one of the actions stored under this card as an extra action there.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.

cards.name: Demon Dogs
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. You may store a minion of power 3 or less from your hand or discard pile under this card. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, you may play a minion stored under it as an extra minion.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.

cards.name: Ectoplasm One
cards.text: Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. If you move a minion, you may destroy an action on the new base.
clarifications: You must move one of your minions there if you have one. If you don’t have one, you may not destroy an action.

cards.name: Librarian Haunt
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, draw three cards.
clarifications: The changes to breakpoints from all Wraiths are added together, even from two with the same name.

cards.name: Resurgence
cards.text: Choose an action on a base. Destroy it or transfer it to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores.
clarifications: If you play it as a Special, you can target an action that’s not on the base being scored.

cards.name: Slimy
cards.text: Wraith - Play on a base. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is increased by 3. After this card is destroyed, each of your minions here gains +2 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: The Tools and The Talent
cards.text: Search your deck for a card and place it on top of your deck

cards.name: Unlicensed Nuclear Accelerator
cards.text: Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. Talent: Destroy one of your actions on this base to place a +1 power counter on this minion.

cards.name: Wreck-It Ralph
cards.text: power 5 - Talent: Play a base modifier here as an extra action, OR destroy a base modifier here.

cards.name: Fix-It Felix Jr.
cards.text: power 4 - Place a base modifier from your discard pile into your hand. Talent: Place a base modifier here on top of its owner’s deck.

cards.name: Vanellope Von Schweetz
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: Move this character to another base and place a +1 power counter on it.

cards.name: Sergeant Calhoun
cards.text: power 3 - Talent: If you have a base modifier here, your other characters currently here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Sugar Rush Racer
cards.text: power 2 - Ongoing: After you play a base modifier, you may move this character to or from that base to give it +1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Cy-Bug Infestation
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Destroy this card and this base. Starting with the player to your left, each player chooses a base and moves all their cards here to there. Replace the base normally.

cards.name: Escape Pod
cards.text: Move up to two of your cards from one base to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores; move one of your cards from the scoring base instead of two.

cards.name: I’m Gonna Wreck It!
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: This base’s breakpoint is reduced by 3. Talent: This base’s abilities are cancelled until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Kart Bakery
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: If you have a character here, draw a card.

cards.name: King Candy
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: You may move this card to another base. Choose a character at this card’s base. Until the start of your next turn, the abilities of character modifiers on it are cancelled and power counters on it do not add to its power.

cards.name: Mints Eruption
cards.text: Choose a base. Swap it with a base in the discard pile. All cards from the original base remain.

cards.name: Research Lab Beacon
cards.text: Base modifier. Ongoing: If there are four or more characters here, destroy this card. Talent: Name a faction. Move all characters of that faction to here.

cards.name: Sugar Rush
cards.text: Base modifier. Talent: Move up to two of your characters from here to another base or from another base to here. They each gain +1 power until the end of the turn.

cards.name: Zombie Lord
cards.text: Power 5 - You may play an extra minion of power 2 or less from your discard pile on each base where you have no minions.
clarifications: You determine which bases you have no minions on when you play Zombie Lord. You may play only one extra minion on each of those bases even if those minions move away. You must play those extra minions immediately.

cards.name: Grave Digger
cards.text: Power 4 - You may place a minion from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Tenacious Z
cards.text: Power 2 - Special: On your turn you may play this card from your discard pile as an extra minion. You may only use the ability of one Tenacious Z each turn.
clarifications: You can only use its ability during the Play Cards phase of your turn. You can only use one Tenacious Z ability per turn, even from the same card.

cards.name: Walker
cards.text: Power 2 - Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or return it to the top of your deck.

cards.name: Grave Robbing
cards.text: Place a card from your discard pile into your hand

cards.name: Lend a Hand
cards.text: Shuffle any number of cards from your discard pile into your deck.
clarifications: This does not get shuffled into the deck with the other cards.

cards.name: Mall Crawl
cards.text: Search your deck for any number of cards with the same name and place them into your discard pile. Shuffle your deck

cards.name: Not Enough Bullets
cards.text: Place any number of minions with the same name from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Outbreak
cards.text: Play an extra minion on a base where you have no minions

cards.name: Overrun
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players cannot play minions on this base. Destroy this action at the start of your turn.

cards.name: They Keep Coming
cards.text: Play an extra minion from your discard pile.

cards.name: They're Coming To Get You
cards.text: Play on a base. Ongoing: Once on your turn, you may play a minion here from your discard pile instead of from your hand.
clarifications: You can use the minion play from the discard pile instead of either a regular minion or a generic extra minion play (e.g. Abduction), as long as it happens during your Play Cards phase. You cannot use it instead of a specific extra minion play (e.g. Hoverbot).
